ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social Security Number (SSN) of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the insurance */,
  "male" INTEGER /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Education level (numeric coding) */,
  "current_smoker" INTEGER /* Current smoking status */,
  "cigs_per_day" INTEGER /* Average cigarettes smoked per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical measurement record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "tot_chol" REAL /* Total cholesterol level */,
  "sys_bp" REAL /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "dia_bp" REAL /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate */,
  "glucose" REAL /* Glucose level */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the clinical metrics were recorded */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the clinical metrics were recorded */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the metrics were recorded */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "prevalent_stroke" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has a history of stroke */,
  "prevalent_hypertension" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has hypertension */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has diabetes */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis for each condition */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Current treatment plan for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "ten_year_chd" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is predicted to have coronary heart disease in the next ten years */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was performed */,
  "assessment_time" TEXT /* Time when the risk assessment was performed */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the risk assessment */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assessment */,
  "predicted_risk_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the predicted risk level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numerical access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the records */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose records are accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the records were accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
